creator: pi@FreeBSD.org
text:
Have you seen that we discuss Data::Page::Set vrs. Data::Pageset in 

https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=208229

which covers rt44 ?

I'm not very surprised that there's a third module with an even more
confusing name, which is even older (2004).

Now, which one does rt44 really require ? And would it be useful to get upstream to use the most recently maintained one (which is already in the ports tree?)
